name: desktop-skins
description: Opinionated desktop overlay skins (Electron + React + TypeScript)

scripts.dev: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
